// <auto-generated by Tech-Cosmos Hub />
using TechCosmos.Core.Runtime;

namespace TechCosmos.Game.Adapters
{
    public struct CastConfirmedEvent
    {
        public EntityHandle Caster;
        public EntityHandle Target;
        public Float3 Point;
        public string TriggerEvent;
        public string ActionId;
    }

    public struct CastRequestedEvent
    {
        public EntityHandle Controller;
        public string ActionId;
        public string RequestId;
    }

    public struct CombatDamageAppliedEvent
    {
        public EntityHandle Source;
        public EntityHandle Target;
        public float Amount;
        public string DamageType;
    }
}
